name: prompt-coach
description: Local-first prompt archive for AI coding tools.

interface.shortDescription: Capture, score, and improve local coding-agent prompts
interface.longDescription: Prompt Memory captures prompts from supported coding agents through local hooks, redacts sensitive values before storage, indexes Markdown in SQLite, and exposes local MCP/CLI workflows for scoring the latest prompt, rewriting it with user approval, reviewing prompt habits, and checking project AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md rules.
defaultPrompt: Set up prompt-coach for this machine
Check whether prompt-coach is capturing Codex prompts
Show my prompt-coach hook rewrite-guard mode
Toggle the prompt-coach rewrite guard between off / context / ask / block-and-copy
Show my prompt-coach buddy side pane command
Run my full prompt coach workflow
Judge my low-scoring prompts with the active agent session
